title: FkKonto (Innlan accounting) — COBOL programs referencing the FKKONTO database or FKKONTO ERP data area
originalTitle: FkKonto oversikt — programmer som refererer til FKKONTO-database eller FKKONTO-filstier (analysert fra Visual COBOL-kilder)
analysisNote: Programs were identified by scanning C:\opt\data\VisualCobol\Sources\cbl\*.CBL for the string FKKONTO. Entries with FKKONTO only in comments or documentation strings (ELISABET, ILALKTO, ILALKTN, TPHSCANR) are omitted.

entries.description: DB2 connection to FKKONTO (CONNECT TO FKKONTO)

entries.description: Update database flag and FKKONTO report paths (KGR95 / endra kunder)
